title: Tracker Slug Bug Fix Report — PHASE 13C.7
summary: 8 tracking bugs identified in Phase 13C.6 Day 5. All 8 were tracker-level errors (wrong slugs in tracker), NOT actual 404 pages. 5 slug corrections applied to tracker logic.

guide_slug_format.root_cause: Tracker used 'how-to-use-{calculatorSlug}-calculator' format instead of correct 'how-to-use-{rawCalculatorSlug}'
guide_slug_format.correct_format: how-to-use-{rawCalculatorSlug} where rawCalculatorSlug is the calculator slug from allCalculators (e.g., 'compound-interest' not 'compound-interest-calculator')
guide_slug_format.fix_applied: Tracker corrected to strip '-calculator' suffix from guide slugs
guide_slug_format.verification: All 4 corrected slugs return HTTP 200 on live site

truncated_blog_slugs.root_cause: Tracker truncated long blog slug. Actual slug is 104 chars but tracker used shortened version.

decision_pages_tracked_as_blogs.root_cause: Tracker used /blog/ prefix for a /decision/ page. 'how-much-emergency-fund' is a decision page, not a blog post.

policy_pages_wrongly_tracked.root_cause: Tracker included /cookies page which is intentionally noindex (privacy policy page).
policy_pages_wrongly_tracked.fix_applied: Removed from tracker — noindex pages should not be tracked for indexing
policy_pages_wrongly_tracked.verification: Page correctly returns noindex, should stay out of tracker

intentional_removals_not_bugs.note: These are NOT tracker bugs — they are correct Phase 2 V2 removals (geo pages, scenario page). Tracker just needed to be updated to stop tracking them.

tracker_corrections_applied.action: Strip '-calculator' suffix from all guide slug entries in tracker
Use full exact slug from posts.ts, never truncate
Verify route type (/blog/, /decision/, /compare/, /guides/) matches actual page route
Filter out noindex pages from tracker (cookies, privacy, terms)
Remove Phase 2 pruned pages from tracker (geo, scenarios)

verification_result: All 8 tracked '404' URLs resolved — 0 real errors, 5 tracking bugs fixed, 3 pruning updates applied
reference: pitfall_46 (guide slug format) and pitfall_47 (404 emergency diagnosis) in qfinhub-quick skill
